message:
test(mcp-proxy): add edge-case tests for prefix sanitization, tool filtering, and server selection

Cover sanitize_prefix_segment (empty, whitespace, special chars,
lowercasing, boundary trimming), filter_remote_tools (mutating allowed,
empty input), and select_proxy_servers (case-insensitive dedup,
disabled-server skipping in mount-all mode, preferred fallback).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
